content.sentence: Chúng ta nên dọn ___ trong công viên.

translation.en: We should clean the trash in the park.

notes_md:
**rác** = trash, garbage, unwanted waste.

It’s an uncountable noun, so you don’t count it directly; use words like **đống rác** (a pile), **túi rác** (a bag), **thùng rác** (trash can). Common verb pairings: **đổ rác** (take out trash), **vứt rác** (throw away), **nhặt rác** (pick up trash), **quét rác** (sweep trash).

Very common extended meaning: something low-quality or unwanted, like **tin rác** (spam) or **cuộc gọi rác** (spam calls).  

Related word: **rác rưởi** = trash/junk, but stronger and more insulting when talking about things or even people.
exampleSentencesTranslated: Remember to put the trash in the bin before going to work.
Every morning, I usually see a lot of trash on the sidewalk.
You should not throw trash on the street because it will make the environment dirty.

content.sentence: Chúng ta nên dọn ___ trong công viên.

translation.en: We should clean the trash in the park.

example.vi: Hãy vứt rác vào thùng rác.
example.es: Por favor, tira la basura en el cubo.
example.en: Please throw the trash in the bin.

definitions.vi: Chất thải; đồ bỏ đi hoặc rác.
definitions.es: Material de desecho; basura o desperdicio.

notes:
rác = trash, garbage, unwanted waste.

It’s an uncountable noun, so you don’t count it directly; use words like đống rác (a pile), túi rác (a bag), thùng rác (trash can). Common verb pairings: đổ rác (take out trash), vứt rác (throw away), nhặt rác (pick up trash), quét rác (sweep trash).

Very common extended meaning: something low-quality or unwanted, like tin rác (spam) or cuộc gọi rác (spam calls).  

Related word: rác rưởi = trash/junk, but stronger and more insulting when talking about things or even people.
exampleSentences: Anh nhớ bỏ rác vào thùng trước khi đi làm nhé.
Mỗi sáng, em thường thấy nhiều rác trên vỉa hè.
Chị không nên vứt rác ra đường vì sẽ làm bẩn môi trường.
